title: Survival
body:
# Survival
This mod forces the gamemode to be survival for in-20091223-2.

**Make sure you run this mod using Quilt in-20091223!**  
*Modrinth doesn't list this version so we have to list it incorrectly.*  

## Dependencies  
- [Quilt Loader](https://quiltmc.org/).  
  - You will need to use [OrnitheMC](https://ornithemc.net/) to use Quilt with Minecraft Indev.  
- [Java 8](https://adoptium.net/temurin/releases/?version=8). (Built using Eclipse Temurin 8.0.412+8)  
- [Minecraft Indev 0.31 in-20091223-2](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Java_Edition_Indev_0.31_20091223-2).  

## Attributions
- [Feather Mappings](https://github.com/OrnitheMC/feather-mappings).  
  - Licensed under [CC0-1.0](https://github.com/OrnitheMC/feather-mappings/blob/main/LICENSE).  
- [Quilt Loader](https://quiltmc.org/).  
  - Licensed under [Apache 2.0](https://github.com/QuiltMC/quilt-loader/blob/develop/LICENSE).    

## Mismatched Versioning  
Section 5.1 of [Modrinth's Content Rules](https://modrinth.com/legal/rules#miscellaneous)  
> All metadata, including license, client/server-side information, tags, etc. are filled out correctly and are consistent with information found elsewhere.  

Modrinth doesn't currently list archived versions of Minecraft ([modrinth:code#2566](https://github.com/modrinth/code/issues/2566)).  
We currently incorrectly list the game version as `c0.30_01c`, but list the actual version in the mod version title, we will fix this once the above mentioned issue has been fixed.
